claimSummary: Bloomington says its service line inventory covers more than 27000 service connections and displays address-level information based on records field verifications and modeling.
reviewerNote: Official Bloomington service line inventory page reviewed manually for searchable inventory coverage.

claimSummary: Bloomington says selected owners may be asked to sign right-of-entry agreements for field verification and that verified lead findings will feed into a future citywide replacement schedule.
reviewerNote: Official Bloomington field-verification and next-step guidance reviewed manually.

claimSummary: Citizens says it launched a searchable customer service line inventory portal and estimates that more than 75000 customers may still own and use lead service lines.
reviewerNote: Official Citizens inventory launch announcement reviewed manually for portal and scale language.

claimSummary: Citizens says it mails letters annually to customers with known or possible lead service lines until physical inspection confirms non-lead status or the line is replaced.
reviewerNote: Official Citizens notification announcement reviewed manually for annual notice rules.

claimSummary: Citizens says its multi-year replacement program fully replaces customer-owned lead service lines, covers proactive neighborhood replacements at no additional cost, and offers owner-initiated pathways with different private-side cost rules.
reviewerNote: Official Citizens replacement program landing page reviewed manually for neighborhood and owner-initiated paths.

claimSummary: Speedway says its October 2024 lead service line inventory covers about 4,300 service connections, remains public through the town page and IDEM, and still includes many unknown line materials while targeted field investigation continues.
reviewerNote: Official Speedway inventory project page reviewed manually for inventory scale and ongoing investigation language.

claimSummary: Speedway says it mails letters to customers with lead or unknown service lines and uses homeowner surveys plus follow-up investigation to reduce unknown records instead of promising blanket immediate replacement.
reviewerNote: Official Speedway public communication guidance reviewed manually for letters, surveys, and unknown-line reduction steps.

claimSummary: EWSU says its service line inventory remains public through IDEM and that field verification continues while unknown service line records are refined.
reviewerNote: Official EWSU lead safety page reviewed manually for IDEM inventory access and field-verification language.

claimSummary: EWSU says customers received service line status letters in November 2024 and that its lead safety page posts downloadable lead galvanized requiring replacement and unknown-status notice copies while field verification continues.
reviewerNote: Official EWSU customer notice guidance reviewed manually for November 2024 letters and downloadable notice copies.

claimSummary: Kendallville says it completed and submitted its lead service line inventory on October 16, 2024 using records review, visual inspections, and potholing.
reviewerNote: Official Kendallville lead line replacement page reviewed manually.

claimSummary: Kendallville says customers with services requiring replacement have received paper letters each year around November or December and will continue receiving them until replacement is recorded, separate from the phased funded replacement rollout.
reviewerNote: Official Kendallville notification language reviewed manually.

claimSummary: Kendallville says its phased lead line replacement program began potholing in March 2026, replacement work began in April 2026, and customers who participate with the required right-of-entry forms pay no additional fees.
reviewerNote: Official Kendallville program details reviewed manually.

claimSummary: Kendallville says no additional fees are required from customers to complete service line replacement at their home if they participate in the city's phased program and return the required forms.
reviewerNote: Official Kendallville cost language reviewed manually.
